description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat, dark roof and clean white exterior walls. The front facade includes a recessed entryway, a garage, and a small landscaped area with greenery. The rear of the house opens to a spacious patio and a rectangular swimming pool, bordered by a low retaining wall and green lawn patches. Large windows dominate the back, providing ample natural light and views to the pool area. The structure is set on a sloped lot, with steps and retaining walls integrated into the landscaping. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with straight lines and a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white house with large windows, a garage, landscaped entry, and a backyard pool on a sloped lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, and a small landscaped area with greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped driveway, garage entrance, and the transition to the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring large windows, a spacious patio, a rectangular swimming pool, and retaining walls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, pool, and the integration of the house with the sloped terrain.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows at the rear
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a single door, steps, and minimal landscaping; no porch or columns.
